sections.kind: Added — `pppk_paruh_waktu` template for PPPK part-time applicant rosters
items: New template for PPPK Paruh Waktu participant allocation lists from SSCASN BKN
Multi-line pdftotext format with page headers + "Laporan digenerate..." footers
Fields: No, Jenis Jabatan (Teknis/Guru), No Peserta (PW...), Nama, Jabatan, Pendidikan
`no_peserta` stored in extra (PW-prefixed registration number, not NIP)
`jabatan` → occupation, `instansi` from document header → employer
Supports Guru sub-spesialisasi (BIMBINGAN KONSELING, IPA, IPS, TIK, etc.)
~11K peserta from Kab. Lombok Timur (Dinas Pendidikan dan Kebudayaan, Bidang Kebudayaan)

sections.kind: Added — `osn_peserta_sd` template for OSN SD participant lists
items: New template for OSN (Olimpiade Sains Nasional) SD participant registration dumps
Fixed-width text format from BPTI Kemendikdasmen (`daftar-bpti.kemendikdasmen.go.id`)
Fields: No, Kode Tim (→ student_id), Nama Peserta, Sekolah (→ employer), Kecamatan, Cabang, Sub Cabang, Status
`kode_tim` mapped to `student_id` (OSNSD2026-... format)
`sector: education` — elementary school students, no PII beyond name + school
~3756 peserta dari Kabupaten Jombang, 21 kecamatan, 3 cabang (Matematika/IPA/IPS)

sections.kind: Added — `crew_sales_target` template for XLS sales crew performance
items: New template for retail sales crew performance tracking spreadsheets (XLS)
NIK column mapped to `employee_id` (8-digit, NOT national_id); `national_id` field confidence threshold set to 0.0 to prevent misclassification
Gender inferred from sheet name (`Crew Wanita` → female, `Crew Pria` → male)
Key columns: NIK, NAMA, KODE TOKO, NAMA TOKO, AC, AM
`input_kind: xlsx` — designed for direct XLS extraction (not PDF+OCR pipeline)
`field_mapping` maps NAMA→full_name, NIK→employee_id, NAMA TOKO→employer
Fields: product target/actual/ACV columns stored in `person.data.extra[]`
`_parse_bibliography_section()` — detect "Daftar Pustaka" heading (with OCR variants like Pustaha) and extract person names from Indonesian-format bibliography entries (`Nama, Gelar, Judul, ...`).
`_parse_bibliography_name()` — parse individual bibliography entry lines, stripping academic titles (SH, MA, Dr., Prof., etc.) to isolate the author name.
`_split_columns()` — handle multi-column OCR layout where bibliography entries appear in the right column.
`_INSTITUTIONAL_KEYWORDS_RE` — filter out institutional authors (Direktorat Jenderal, Kementerian, etc.).
`_BIBLIOGRAPHY_DEGREE_STRICT_RE` — strict degree pattern matching to avoid false positives from document text.
`parse_simple_personnel_roster()` — fallback to bibliography parsing after issuer extraction returns zero results.
Name validation uses title-case check (each word starts uppercase) instead of all-caps ratio, since bibliography names are in title case rather than roster-style ALL CAPS.

sections.kind: Added — Issuer/signatory extraction from Perda signature blocks
items: `_extract_issuers_from_text()` — scan ALL pages in reverse for signature blocks (not just last page), because many Perda have lampiran/penjelasan after the signature.
`_extract_issuers_from_page()` — extract MULTIPLE position+name pairs (e.g. Gubernur + Sekda) from a single signature page, returning one ExtractionResult per issuer.
`_extract_issuer_from_text()` / `_extract_issuer_from_last_page()` retained as legacy wrappers.
Added issuer block keyword guard (`_ISSUER_BLOCK_RE`) + position title requirement to filter false positives from non-signature pages.

`parse_simple_personnel_roster()` — when no tabular `NAMA/JABATAN` roster header found, fall back to `engine._extract_issuers_from_text()` to extract signatory persons from Perda/Pergub/Perbup documents.
Added `menteri` to `_POSITION_RE` for Kepmen/Keputusan Menteri signature blocks.
Added `republik indonesia` to `_REGION_KEYWORDS` non-person filter.
Strip trailing colon from position lines.
Replaced `^` anchor with `\b` word boundary in `_POSITION_RE` so position titles still match on OCR-garbled lines (e.g. `L L BUPATI TABALONG VV` where `L L ` is OCR junk).

sections.kind: Changed — Queue processing: row 597 (Pergub Jambi No. 44/2014)
items: 2 persons extracted & saved (signatories).
Document was skipped by precheck (URL keyword "Pergub") — processed manually via issuer fallback.
Row 598: 1 person saved (signatory).
Row 601: 1 person saved (signatory).
65/71 tests pass (3 pre-existing failures, 3 pre-existing skips) — baseline unchanged.

`scripts/extraction/engine.py` — `extract_persons()` memanggil `_extract_issuer_from_last_page(text)` sebagai fallback terakhir saat hasil ekstraksi kosong. Juga aktif saat rows-only extraction gagal.
`_extract_issuer_from_last_page()` — Memisahkan halaman dengan `\x0c` (form feed dari OCR), mengambil halaman terakhir. Dua strategi pencarian nama:
`_is_not_person_name()` — Filter nama non-orang: jabatan (bupati, kepala, direktur, sekretaris), wilayah (kabupaten, provinsi, dinas), kata kunci dokumen (peraturan, lembaran, pasal), baris >6 kata.
Ekstraksi NIP (18 digit) sebagai `employee_id`, jabatan sebagai `occupation`.
Nama dibersihkan via `strip_titles()` sebelum `_finalize` agar confidence tidak di-reset oleh `_ai_fallback` heuristic yang bisa salah cocok multi-line.
Confidence diset ≥ 0.8 sehingga `_ai_fallback` di `_finalize` tidak mengganti nama dengan heuristic match yang lebih buruk.
Peringatan `"Person extracted from last page as issuer/signatory"` ditambahkan ke setiap hasil fallback.

OCR: default pdftoppm DPI 600→300 (17-page PERDA timed out at 600 DPI).
`process_platform.py`: init missing `STATS['engine_with_fallback']` KeyError.
`templates/surat_undangan.json`: tighten keywords — prevent false match on "perundang-undangan".
`scripts/validate.py`: fix Python 3.14 regex incompatibility (`\1` backreference from non-capturing group).
`scripts/pipeline/row.py`: handle 0-person extraction as `skipped_non_person` (was `failed_validate`).
`scripts/extraction/engine.py` — `ExtractionEngine.extract_persons()` sebagai entry point. Template tanpa bespoke parser otomatis menggunakan engine. AI fallback untuk field low-confidence.
`scripts/extraction/structure.py` — Klasifikasi input: `TABLE / LABEL_VALUE / FREE_TEXT / MIXED`.
`scripts/extraction/confidence.py` — `score_field()` per-field + `score_person()` weighted average; deteksi kontaminasi (nama kotor, alamat, telepon di field salah).
`scripts/extractors/*.py` — 18 shared extractors, masing-masing punya `extract_from_text()` + `extract_from_rows()`:
Multi-strategy voting — `BaseExtractor.best()` meng-cluster kandidat by normalized value, boost confidence +0.1 per strategy yang setuju (max +0.3). Mengganti "pick highest confidence".
Compound field_mapping parsing — 38 mapping aktif di template. Engine membaca `extraction_hints.field_mapping` dan men-route ke extractor yang tepat.

Template `field_definitions` — 7 template, 14 field definitions (type, required, min/max_length, pattern, confidence_threshold). Engine membaca di `_finalize()` untuk per-field validation warnings/demotion.

Confidence gating — `PROCESS_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD` env var (default 0.5). Avg confidence < threshold → outcome `extracted_low_confidence`, doc disimpan dengan label "LOW CONFIDENCE", tidak auto-commit.

`scripts/processors/process_platform.py` — Rewritten: `ExtractionEngine` sole path, `_result_to_person()` dengan confidence-based field demotion (high → store, medium → store+note, low → demote ke `extra[]`). `extract_tabular` fallback removed.
`scripts/parsers/parse_asn_pns.py` — Migrated ke ExtractionEngine untuk confidence-scored extraction. Legacy continuation-line logic preserved sebagai fallback.
`templates/_schema.json` — Added `field_mapping` dan `field_definitions` documented fields.

37 templates updated — Added/expanded `field_mapping` and/or `field_definitions` entries (`asn_pns`, `biodata`, `bip`, `kk_2018`, `data_akademik`, `data_perusahaan`, `lhkpn`, `daftar_umkm`, `data_relawan`, `contact_person`, `dapil`, dll).

`scripts/validate.py` — `validate_full_name()` expanded: document section headers, form requirement text, legal/administrative phrases, numeric+punctuation, long descriptive sentences, address indicators (RT/RW+number, Dusun+Blok), date patterns, double-space detection. `ALLOWED_SINGLE_NAMES` reset to empty set.
`scripts/extract_tabular.py` — Added `validate_full_name()` gate di akhir extraction loop: row dengan nama invalid di-skip (defense-in-depth).

`AGENT.md` — Updated pipeline table: engine universal fallback untuk semua 65 template; outcome `extracted_low_confidence`; engine v3.0 documentation section (sole path, field_definitions, multi-strategy voting, AI fallback, confidence gating); doc file extensions `.txt` → `.md`.
`docs/PIPELINE.md` — Added ExtractionEngine v3.0 section: 4-layer architecture, 18 extractors table, multi-strategy voting, AI fallback, confidence gating, universal fallback.
`scripts/pipeline/routes.py` — Engine universal fallback untuk semua template; `process_platform` added otomatis.
14/14 tests (`make test`) — pass
3/3 compare-batch — pass
A/B test passed — engine output vs legacy `extract_tabular` output equivalent
`cleanse_persons.py` — Cascade cleansing pipeline:

sections.kind: Review findings — action items for next iteration
items: `try_recover_name()` duplikat tapi tidak lengkap dari `looks_like_person_name()` — Fungsi mengecek ulang `NON_PERSON_WORDS` dan `NON_PERSON_PHRASES` secara manual, tapi tidak mengecek `JOB_TITLE_PATTERN` dan regex numeric. Fix: buang duplikasi, langsung panggil `looks_like_person_name()`.

TRENGGALEK step tidak handle `"JAWA TIMUR"` prefix — Entry condition memicu pada `'JAWA TIMUR' in name`, tapi `parts[-1]` hanya dicek `startswith('JATIM')`. Jika data berisi `"..., JAWA TIMUR GURU"`, occupation `"GURU"` hilang. Fix: tambah branch `jatim_occ.upper().startswith('JAWA TIMUR')`.
Duplicate `'KAMULAN'` di `VILLAGES` list — Muncul dua kali (line 28 & 33). Indikasi copy-paste error; mungkin ada nama desa yang seharusnya ada di slot tersebut.

Tidak ada auto-backup sebelum cleansing — Ada `--restore` tapi tidak ada `create_backup()` di awal `main()`. User yang lupa `--dry-run` tidak bisa undo. Fix: tambah `shutil.copy2(DB_PATH, BACKUP_PATH)` di awal `main()`.

`LOOSE_ADDR_KEYWORDS[:4]` fallback tanpa dokumentasi — Slice `[:4]` mengambil 4 keyword terpanjang secara arbitrary. Jika list di-reorder, behavior berubah tanpa warning. Fix: definisikan eksplisit atau hapus (loose matching di step 11 sudah cover).
`looks_like_person_name()` tidak strip sebelum cek panjang — `"  A  "` (satu huruf + spasi) lolos karena `len() == 5`. Fix: tambah `s = s.strip()` di awal fungsi.
Short village names (`'CARI'`, `'SAMBI'`) di `LOOSE_ADDR_KEYWORDS` bisa false-match di loose mode, tapi praktiknya minim karena hanya dipakai untuk digit-prefixed records.
Step 11 double-runs strict lalu loose — wasteful tapi tidak salah.
Regex `3[ D]?[Pp]` over-match pada `3 D` — acceptable karena konteks digit-prefix berarti kontaminasi.

`scripts/pipeline/row.py` — Post-OCR reclassification: when pre-OCR classification fails (template=None), re-attempts classification on OCR text. Fixes URLs with non-descriptive titles (UUIDs, hashes).
`templates/sk_penunjukan_petugas_dtks.json` — Added SIKS-NG keywords, `platform: true`, removed `table_expected: false`.
`scripts/parsers/parse_sk_penunjukan_petugas_dtks.py` — Label-value parser for SK penunjukan petugas DTKS (Nama/NIP/NIK/HP/Email blocks).
`scripts/processors/process_sk_penunjukan_petugas_dtks.py` — BatchProcessor runner for DTKS appointment decrees.
`scripts/parsers/parse_surat_pengajuan.py` — Parser for official government letters: inline contacts (CP drh./drg./dr. + HP), signatory with NIP.
`scripts/processors/process_surat_pengajuan.py` — BatchProcessor runner for surat pengajuan/dinas.
`templates/surat_pengajuan.json` — Added `platform: true`, `field_mapping`, updated notes for inline-contact extraction.

sections.kind: Enhanced — data_induk_desa parser: Data Penduduk per-dusun format
items: `scripts/parse_data_induk_desa.py` — Added "datapenduduk" format auto-detection for per-dusun population data sheets. Detects sheets with dusun names and NIK columns (16+ digit), parses primary sheet with 19-column layout (KK, NIK, nama, SHDK, gender, POB, DOB, marital, parents, education, religion, occupation, dusun, RT/RW, zip, village, district). Handles 13-15 column variants via content heuristics.
`scripts/pipeline/row.py` — XLS bypass now runs parser subprocess before extract (cwd=SCRIPTS_DIR, -m parsers.*), producing row.json for `parsed_json_xlsx` profile.
`scripts/processors/process_data_induk_desa.py` — Fallback default fact for persons with no facts (same pattern as process_bip fix).
3.361 persons — Doc `01KSN0EM20WBTTG9KP2EQ3SH99`, template `data_induk_desa`.

sections.kind: Added — parse_penduduk_compress: compressed multi-sheet XLSX parser
items: `scripts/parsers/parse_penduduk_compress.py` — New bespoke parser for compressed XLSX workbooks where multiple persons are packed into single cells with `\n` separators (print-optimized layout). Handles 371-sheet workbook with per-dusun tables; supports two NIK column formats (NO+NIK alternating with local KK, and bare NIK alternating with local KK). Extracts NIK, Nama, No KK, Dusun, RW, RT, Umur, Pendidikan, Pekerjaan, Status Kawin, STA from packed cells + attribute rows. Dedup by NIK across sheets.
4.834 persons — Doc `01KSN22P4PTAYV30YXV504ADRN`, template `data_induk_desa`.

`templates/kk_2018.json` — New template for Kartu Keluarga (KK) XLS documents with repeating blocks (KK header + anggota rows). Field mapping: NIK→national_id, NAMA→full_name, JK→gender, TMPT LAHIR→pob, TGL_LAHIR→dob, AGAMA→religion, STATUS→marital_status, PEKERJAAN→occupation, IBU→mother_maiden_name, plus extra for GDR, SHDRT, PDDK, AYAH, PARAF, No.KK, Alamat.

`scripts/parsers/parse_kk_2018.py` — Bespoke parser for KK XLS format: detects KK header blocks (NO. KK, NAMA. KK, ALAMAT) then reads person rows with NO/NIK/NAMA/JK/TTL/GDR/AGAMA/STATUS/SHRDT/PDDK/PEKERJAAN/IBU/AYAH. Dedup by NIK.
`scripts/processors/process_kk_2018.py` — Batch processor for KK data, creates document + 4351 persons via BatchProcessor.
4.351 persons — Doc `01KSMY5HKK8MP2J0HQH4SYHE3Z`, template `kk_2018`.

sections.kind: Added — bip template (Buku Induk Kependudukan XLS)
items: `templates/bip.json` — New template for Buku Induk Kependudukan (BIP) XLS documents. Mirip KK dengan kolom geser 1 (kolom 0 kosong). Field mapping: NIK→national_id, NAMA→full_name, JK→gender, TMPT LHR→pob, TGL LHR→dob, AGAMA→religion, STATUS→marital_status, PEKERJAAN→occupation, NAMA IBU→mother_maiden_name, plus extra untuk G.DRH, HUB.KEL, PENDIDIKAN, NAMA AYAH, No.KK, Alamat, wilayah.

`scripts/parsers/parse_bip.py` — Bespoke parser for BIP XLS format: handles multi-sheet (BIP_Desa-Kel_1 + BIP_Desa-Kel_x), xlrd date cells properly, metadata rows (PROVINSI/KABUPATEN/KECAMATAN/DESA), KK header blocks dengan Excel formula.

`scripts/process_student_roster.py` — Accepts parser payloads with `persons`/`meta`, preserves parser facts, and supports `extras`/`extra` inputs.
`templates/data_akademik.json` — Route notes include the text roster parser.
2,061 persons — Doc `01KSEF5X1WS6HBHHNBS81NSNBQ`, template `data_akademik`.

sections.kind: Processed — BIP-WNI Buku Induk Penduduk roster (manual)

`templates/data_induk_desa.json` — Notes updated with BIP-WNI format detection guidance.

`scripts/process_census_listing.py` — Processor with BatchProcessor, document creation, provenance edges.

`scripts/parse_bpum_scribd.py` — New parser for BPUM documents without bank/nominal columns (Scribd text export with ragged multi-line rows). Anchors on NIK + row-number lines to extract name, phone, address, business type, proposer.
`scripts/process_bpum_scribd.py` — New processor using `parse_bpum_scribd` + BatchProcessor.

sections.kind: Enhanced — Generic student roster XLSX parser
items: `scripts/parse_student_roster_xlsx.py` — Header auto-detection (scan first 15 rows for `NAMA`), combined POB+DOB field splitting (`TEMPAT & TANGGAL LAHIR`), gender normalization (Laki-Laki→male, Prempuan→female), additional column patterns (NIM/NPM, JURUSAN PRODI, JENIS/KELAMIN, UNIVERSITAS, SEMESTER, JENJANG, bank/rekening), cross-sheet dedup by name, extra categories (financial, origin, admin).
6 persons — Profil DPK Kab. Kepulauan Selayar 2024 (§2.7, termasuk Sekretaris). Doc `01KSDRQTBMFZEWR98JW3XG9MS1`.

5 persons — Profil singkat pejabat struktural (section 2.7). Doc `01KSDRKQFKVYDDQN80C7TAZHS2`.
`scripts/parse_profil_pejabat_struktural.py` — Parse blocks Nama + Pangkat/Golongan under *Profil Singkat Pejabat Struktural*.

Inline extraction for 559 ASN entries from 30-page pdftotext roster (multi-OPD).

sections.kind: Added — Wilayah document fallback & geo map alignment
items: `scripts/address_structured.py` — `has_complete_residence_wilayah()`, `enrich_document_wilayah()`, `infer_document_wilayah_text()`, `municipality_name_from_structured()`, `MUNICIPALITY_ADDRESS_TYPES`: infer kab/kota dari konteks dokumen hanya bila person belum punya alamat domisili lengkap.

`scripts/backfill_document_wilayah.py` — Backfill massal `--all` atau per `--doc-id`: infer wilayah dari judul/deskripsi dokumen (Sambas, Bukittinggi, IKN, dll.); lewati dokumen kementerian nasional tanpa kab/kota lokal.
AGENT.md — Section *Wilayah, structured_address, and geo map*: aturan lintas-pipeline (per-row vs document-level, geo tidak memakai `employer` saja, refresh summary setelah backfill).
`scripts/summary/geo.py` — Peta agregat membaca `structured_address` bertipe `municipality` atau `city` (selaras parser & `samples/person.json`), tidak hanya `city`.
`scripts/process_skd_sambas.py` — Entri baru + `--repair`: isi `structured_address` Kabupaten Sambas bila domisili kosong.
`scripts/process_skd_bukittinggi.py` — `enrich_document_wilayah` untuk Kota Bukittinggi pada roster tanpa alamat per baris.
`web/data/id-city-coords.json` — Koordinat IKN / Ibu Kota Nusantara (-0.9720, 116.7131); roster Otorita IKN memakai label ini (bukan proxy Penajam Paser Utara).
`scripts/process_ikn_batch.py` — `IKN_STRUCTURED_ADDRESS` + koordinat Ibu Kota Nusantara untuk roster IKN tanpa alamat per baris.

22,923 persons — `backfill_document_wilayah.py --all`: SKD CPNS Kab. Sambas 2019 (5,489) + 2021 (2,412), Kota Bukittinggi 2018 (180), Otorita IKN 2024 (14,842). Hanya roster seleksi CPNS/SKD tanpa domisili per baris; dokumen kementerian nasional dilewati.

`templates/data_anggota_dprd.json` — Classify keywords; parser/processor routing.

sections.kind: Added — Generic XLSX student roster parser (Scribd UT Pokjar)
items: `scripts/parse_student_roster_xlsx.py` — Generic XLSX student roster parser: auto-detect columns by case-insensitive header (nim/nisn/nrp → student_id, nama_* → full_name, alamat_* → address, NIK, gender, agama, pob, dob, phone, email, prodi, fakultas, angkatan); all unmapped columns → extras; supports multi-sheet XLSX.
`scripts/process_student_roster.py` — Made generic: auto-detect institution/study program from persons.json extras; accepts `--title` and `--institution` CLI flags; no more hardcoded school name.
`templates/data_akademik.json` — Notes updated for generic parse_student_roster_xlsx routing.
